metadata.description: Procedural recipes for 56+ common environmental props. Chapter 1: The Living Room & Furniture.

terminology.procedural: Generating geometry via parameters instead of manual sculpting
terminology.leg_offset: The distance from the corner of a table/chair to the leg center
terminology.slats: The horizontal or vertical bars in a chair back or fence
terminology.array: Copying an item multiple times in a row

chains.title: Procedural Spiral Staircase (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Central-pole staircase with rotating steps

parms.snippet: float i = detail(1, 'iteration'); float angle = i * 0.4; matrix3 m = ident(); rotate(m, angle, {0,1,0}); @P *= m; @P.y = i * 0.18;

chains.output_description: A procedural spiral staircase wound around a central support pole.

chains.title: Procedural Straight Staircase HDA (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Parametric straight staircase with exposed step_count, step_width, step_depth, step_height — packaged as an HDA
chains.hda_creation_code:
import hou
# 1. Create geo container
geo = hou.node('/obj').createNode('geo', 'staircase_geo')
# 2. Build the wrangle
w = geo.createNode('attribwrangle', 'stair_wrangle')
w.parm('class').set(1)  # detail
w.parm('snippet').set(SNIPPET)  # insert snippet above
# 3. Add channel references so HDA parms drive the wrangle
# 4. Promote to subnet, then createDigitalAsset
subnet = hou.node('/obj').createNode('subnet', 'staircase_hda_subnet')
for child in geo.children():
    child.setInput(0, None)
# 5. createDigitalAsset
hda = subnet.createDigitalAsset(
    name='staircase_hda',
    hda_file_name='$HOME/houdini20.5/otls/staircase_hda.hda',
    description='Procedural Straight Staircase'
)
hda_def = hda.type().definition()
ptg = hda_def.parmTemplateGroup()
ptg.append(hou.IntParmTemplate('step_count', 'Step Count', 1, default_value=(12,), min=2, max=50))
ptg.append(hou.FloatParmTemplate('step_width', 'Step Width', 1, default_value=(1.2,), min=0.3, max=5.0))
ptg.append(hou.FloatParmTemplate('step_depth', 'Step Depth', 1, default_value=(0.28,), min=0.1, max=1.0))
ptg.append(hou.FloatParmTemplate('step_height', 'Step Height', 1, default_value=(0.18,), min=0.05, max=0.5))
hda_def.setParmTemplateGroup(ptg)
hda_def.save(hda_def.libraryFilePath())
chains.output_description: A parametric straight staircase as an HDA. Change step_count to add/remove steps; step_width/depth/height control proportions. The entire stair is generated in a single detail-class attribwrangle — no Copy-to-Points needed.

chains.title: Procedural Ladder HDA (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Parametric ladder with rung_count, rung_spacing, rail_height, rail_radius, rung_radius — packaged as HDA
chains.build_strategy: Two vertical rails (tubes) + array of horizontal rungs via for-each loop. All dimensions driven by promoted HDA parameters using ch() references.
chains.hda_creation_code:
import hou
# Full ladder HDA creation
parent = '/obj'
geo = hou.node(parent).createNode('geo', 'ladder_build')

# Left rail
lr = geo.createNode('tube', 'left_rail')
lr.parm('rad1').setExpression("ch('../rung_radius')")
lr.parm('height').setExpression("ch('../rung_spacing') * (chi('../rung_count') - 1)")
lr.parm('ty').setExpression("ch('../rung_spacing') * (chi('../rung_count') - 1) * 0.5")
lr.parm('tx').setExpression("-ch('../rail_width') * 0.5")

# Right rail
rr = geo.createNode('tube', 'right_rail')
rr.parm('rad1').setExpression("ch('../rung_radius')")
rr.parm('height').setExpression("ch('../rung_spacing') * (chi('../rung_count') - 1)")
rr.parm('ty').setExpression("ch('../rung_spacing') * (chi('../rung_count') - 1) * 0.5")
rr.parm('tx').setExpression("ch('../rail_width') * 0.5")

# Rung template
rt = geo.createNode('tube', 'rung_template')
rt.parm('rad1').setExpression("ch('../rung_radius')")
rt.parm('height').setExpression("ch('../rail_width')")
rt.parm('orient').set(2)  # Z orient

# Points for copy
pts = geo.createNode('line', 'rung_points')
pts.parm('points').setExpression("chi('../rung_count')")
pts.parm('dist').setExpression("ch('../rung_spacing') * (chi('../rung_count') - 1)")
pts.parm('diry').set(1); pts.parm('dirx').set(0); pts.parm('dirz').set(0)

# Copy rungs
cp = geo.createNode('copytopoints', 'copy_rungs')
cp.setInput(0, rt); cp.setInput(1, pts)

# Merge
m = geo.createNode('merge', 'merge_ladder')
m.setInput(0, lr); m.setInput(1, rr); m.setInput(2, cp)

# Promote to HDA
subnet = hou.node('/obj').createNode('subnet', 'ladder_subnet')
hda = subnet.createDigitalAsset(
    name='ladder_hda',
    hda_file_name='$HOME/houdini20.5/otls/ladder_hda.hda',
    description='Procedural Ladder'
)
hda_def = hda.type().definition()
ptg = hda_def.parmTemplateGroup()
ptg.append(hou.IntParmTemplate('rung_count',   'Rung Count',      1, default_value=(10,), min=2, max=50))
ptg.append(hou.FloatParmTemplate('rung_spacing','Rung Spacing',   1, default_value=(0.3,), min=0.1, max=1.0))
ptg.append(hou.FloatParmTemplate('rail_width',  'Rail Width',     1, default_value=(0.5,), min=0.2, max=2.0))
ptg.append(hou.FloatParmTemplate('rail_radius', 'Rail Tube Radius',1, default_value=(0.025,), min=0.005, max=0.1))
ptg.append(hou.FloatParmTemplate('rung_radius', 'Rung Radius',   1, default_value=(0.015,), min=0.003, max=0.08))
hda_def.setParmTemplateGroup(ptg)
hda_def.save(hda_def.libraryFilePath())
chains.output_description: Two vertical tube rails + evenly-spaced horizontal rungs via Copy-to-Points. All five dimensions are HDA parameters. Changing rung_count instantly adds or removes rungs; rail height auto-follows.

chains.title: Procedural Staircase with Railing HDA (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Straight staircase combined with side railings — all exposed as HDA parms
chains.build_strategy: Stair treads and risers from attribwrangle (detail class). Handrail top bar as a swept curve following the stair slope. Spindles via Copy-to-Points along the stair path. has_railing toggle uses a Switch SOP to output stairs-only or stairs+railing.

parms.snippet: // same snippet as prop_053 but reads from ch()

int n=chi('step_count'); float d=chf('step_depth'); float h=chf('step_height'); float rh=chf('rail_height');
for(int i=0;i<=n;i++){addpoint(0,set(0,(i*h)+rh,i*d)); addpoint(0,set(chf('step_width'),(i*h)+rh,i*d));}

int n=chi('step_count'); int sp=chi('spindle_count'); float d=chf('step_depth'); float h=chf('step_height');
for(int i=0;i<n;i++){for(int j=0;j<sp;j++){float u=(j+0.5)/sp; addpoint(0,set(0,i*h + u*chf('step_height'),(i+u)*d));}}

chains.output_description: Straight staircase with optional side railings and spindles. has_railing toggle uses a Switch SOP so the stair geometry still cooks while railings are hidden, avoiding network rebuilds.

chains.title: HDA Authoring Workflow — Complete Python Recipe
chains.goal: Step-by-step pattern for creating any parametric HDA from a SOP network
hda_creation_steps: 1. Build the SOP network inside a geo node (the network the HDA will wrap).
2. Use ch() / chi() / chv() references inside wrangles/expressions — these become the HDA parms.
3. Select all nodes → RMB → 'Collapse Into Subnet'  (or use execute_python to createNode('subnet')).
5. Build the parmTemplateGroup: add IntParmTemplate / FloatParmTemplate / ToggleParmTemplate / MenuParmTemplate.
7. Wire the HDA parms to the inner ch() channels — use setExpression or Promote Parameter.
chains.code:
import hou

# ─── Step 1: build network inside a geo ───────────────────────────────────────
geo = hou.node('/obj').createNode('geo', 'my_prop_build')
box = geo.createNode('box', 'shape')
box.parm('sizex').setExpression("ch('../width')")
box.parm('sizey').setExpression("ch('../height')")
box.parm('sizez').setExpression("ch('../depth')")
null = geo.createNode('null', 'OUT')
null.setInput(0, box)
geo.layoutChildren()

# ─── Step 2: collapse to subnet ───────────────────────────────────────────────
# (in the UI: select all → RMB → Collapse Into Subnet)
# Via Python, move children or build subnet directly:
subnet = hou.node('/obj').createNode('subnet', 'my_prop_subnet')

# ─── Step 3: createDigitalAsset ───────────────────────────────────────────────
hda_node = subnet.createDigitalAsset(
    name         = 'my_prop',                              # internal type name
    hda_file_name= '$HOME/houdini20.5/otls/my_prop.hda',  # save path
    description  = 'My Parametric Prop',                  # UI label
    min_num_inputs = 0,
    max_num_inputs = 1,
)
hda_def = hda_node.type().definition()

# ─── Step 4: build parameter interface ────────────────────────────────────────
ptg = hda_def.parmTemplateGroup()

# Float parm
ptg.append(hou.FloatParmTemplate(
    'width', 'Width', 1,
    default_value=(1.0,), min=0.1, max=10.0,
    help='Total width of the prop in metres.'
))
# Int parm
ptg.append(hou.IntParmTemplate(
    'count', 'Count', 1,
    default_value=(5,), min=1, max=100
))
# Toggle (checkbox)
ptg.append(hou.ToggleParmTemplate(
    'enable_caps', 'Enable Caps', default_value=True
))
# String / file path
ptg.append(hou.StringParmTemplate(
    'texture_path', 'Texture', 1,
    string_type=hou.stringParmType.FileReference,
    file_type=hou.fileType.Image
))
# Menu
ptg.append(hou.MenuParmTemplate(
    'mode', 'Build Mode',
    menu_items=('simple', 'detailed', 'lod'),
    menu_labels=('Simple', 'Detailed', 'LOD Variant'),
    default_value=0
))
# Folder / Tab
folder = hou.FolderParmTemplate('adv', 'Advanced', folder_type=hou.folderType.Tabs)
folder.addParmTemplate(hou.FloatParmTemplate('bevel_amount', 'Bevel', 1, default_value=(0.02,)))
ptg.append(folder)

hda_def.setParmTemplateGroup(ptg)
hda_def.save(hda_def.libraryFilePath())

# ─── Step 5: verify ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
print('HDA saved to:', hda_def.libraryFilePath())
print('Parm count:',  len(hda_node.parmTemplateGroup().parmTemplates()))
chains.explanation: Complete HDA authoring recipe. Use FloatParmTemplate for continuous values, IntParmTemplate for counts/integers, ToggleParmTemplate for on/off switches, MenuParmTemplate for discrete choices. Always call hda_def.save() at the end. Use ch('../parm_name') inside child node expressions to wire HDA parms to the network.
